forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: a780
+title: 'Review engine: .reviewignore (auto-generated, `.kanban/` by default) + honor .gitignore in scope resolution'
+---
+## What
+
+The review engine's scope stage has no ignore mechanism: `resolve_working` in `crates/swissarmyhammer-validators/src/review/scope.rs` sweeps every tracked change plus untracked code files, and `resolve_sha`/`resolve_glob` take whatever git/the glob returns. Non-source artifacts — most painfully the `.kanban/` board files that every finish-loop comment touches — land in review scope and generate churn. Add a `.reviewignore` file (gitignore syntax), auto-generated at the repo root with `.kanban/` in it by default, and additionally exclude anything the repo's `.gitignore` chain ignores (gitignored files aren't source and must never be reviewed, e.g. a `Scope::Sha`/`Scope::Glob` that touches committed-but-ignored artifacts).
+
+Implementation shape — one choke point, gitignore semantics via the `ignore` crate (workspace dep `ignore = "0.4"` already exists; add `ignore = { workspace = true }` to `crates/swissarmyhammer-validators/Cargo.toml` next to `glob`):
+
+1. **New module `crates/swissarmyhammer-validators/src/review/ignore.rs`** (registered in `src/review/mod.rs`):
+   - `ensure_reviewignore(repo_path) -> PathBuf`: if `<repo>/.reviewignore` is missing, write the default template — a short comment header explaining the file (gitignore syntax, consumed by `review` ops) plus `.kanban/`. Never overwrite or append to an existing file; user edits are authoritative.
+   - `load_review_ignore_matcher(repo_path)`: build an `ignore::gitignore::Gitignore` via `GitignoreBuilder::new(repo_path)`, adding `<repo>/.reviewignore` and `<repo>/.gitignore` (builder's `add()` — missing files are fine). Full gitignore semantics including `!` negation. Match directories correctly (`matched_path_or_any_parents` so `.kanban/` excludes files under it).
+2. **Apply in `resolve_scope_files` (`scope.rs`)**: after the per-scope resolver returns its `ResolvedScope`, filter the file set through the matcher so all four scopes (`Working`/`Sha`/`File`/`Glob`) are covered uniformly. An explicitly named `Scope::File` that is ignored resolves to an empty scope (consistent, not an error). Log each excluded path at debug with the pattern source — full paths, never truncated.
+3. Call `ensure_reviewignore` from the same entry (`scope_review`'s scope-resolution path) so any review op auto-generates the file on first run. The generated `.reviewignore` itself is a new untracked non-code file, so it does not enter the working scope.
+
+Subtasks:
+- [ ] `ignore.rs` module: `ensure_reviewignore` (default template with `.kanban/`, never clobbers existing) + `load_review_ignore_matcher` (.reviewignore + .gitignore via `GitignoreBuilder`)
+- [ ] Filter in `resolve_scope_files` covering all four scopes; debug-log exclusions
+- [ ] `ignore = { workspace = true }` in validators Cargo.toml
+- [ ] Document the file in `crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/review/description.md`
+- [ ] Tests (below)
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] Running any review op in a repo without `.reviewignore` creates it at the repo root containing `.kanban/`; a pre-existing `.reviewignore` is never modified (byte-identical after the run)
+- [ ] A tracked, edited file under `.kanban/` is excluded from `Scope::Working`; an untracked `.kanban/` file is excluded too
+- [ ] A file matched by the repo's `.gitignore` is excluded from `Scope::Sha` and `Scope::Glob` results even when committed/tracked
+- [ ] Gitignore semantics hold: a `!pattern` negation in `.reviewignore` re-includes a file that a broader pattern excluded
+- [ ] `Scope::File` naming an ignored path yields an empty scope (no findings, no error), and non-ignored review behavior is unchanged (existing scope tests stay green)
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Unit tests in the existing `scope.rs` test module (`TestRepo` harness): (1) tracked+edited `.kanban/board.md` excluded from working scope, (2) committed file matching `.gitignore` excluded from sha scope, (3) glob scope excludes `.reviewignore`d files, (4) `!` negation re-includes, (5) auto-generation creates the default file and a second run preserves a user-edited one
+- [ ] Unit tests in `ignore.rs` for template content and matcher construction with missing `.gitignore`/`.reviewignore`
+- [ ] Run: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-validators review::scope` and `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-validators review::ignore` — green, all under 10s
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

+  text: 'Batch /finish #review picked this next (review column empty; features remaining). Iteration 1: /implement. Note the batch-wide lesson now in force: reviews use git-diff scope discipline (findings must be inside HEAD~1..HEAD hunks), so pre-existing-code churn is filtered — but THIS card''s own goal (.reviewignore + honor .gitignore) is the complementary fix that stops .kanban and gitignored artifacts entering review scope in the first place.'

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -6,6 +6,19 @@
   id: 01ky1n1msnvrvxnkmmvm9m3xjg
   text: 'Batch /finish #review picked this next (review column empty; features remaining). Iteration 1: /implement. Note the batch-wide lesson now in force: reviews use git-diff scope discipline (findings must be inside HEAD~1..HEAD hunks), so pre-existing-code churn is filtered — but THIS card''s own goal (.reviewignore + honor .gitignore) is the complementary fix that stops .kanban and gitignored artifacts entering review scope in the first place.'
   timestamp: 2026-07-21T06:15:40.085371+00:00
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01ky1np4eks1zn7peym8gr4nb9
+  text: |-
+    Implemented via TDD. New module review/ignore.rs: ensure_reviewignore (default `.kanban/` template, never clobbers), load_review_ignore_matcher (GitignoreBuilder rooted at repo, adds .gitignore then .reviewignore LAST so `!` negations win — last-match-wins), review_ignore_reason (matched_path_or_any_parents so `.kanban/` dir pattern excludes files beneath; returns pattern+source string for logging). Added `ignore = { workspace = true }` to validators Cargo.toml.
+
+    scope.rs: resolve_scope_files now (1) calls ensure_reviewignore first (auto-gen on first run; the generated file is untracked+non-code so it never enters working scope), (2) resolves the per-scope files, (3) filters through filter_resolved_scope — the single choke point covering Working/Sha/File/Glob uniformly, dropping excluded paths from all three ResolvedScope views (files, file_changes, after_content) and debug-logging each exclusion with FULL path + pattern source. A Scope::File naming an ignored path -> empty scope. Filter sits at scope level, upstream-compatible with read_working's confine_to_repo (^hvs69xt).
+
+    Key API facts pinned from ignore-0.4.25 source: add() returns Some(Io) for a missing file (guarded via .exists()); matched_path_or_any_parents panics if path not under root (safe: repo-relative paths carry no root); require_literal_separator:false means glob `src/*.rs` crosses `/`.
+
+    12 new tests (6 in ignore.rs, 6 in scope.rs TestRepo harness) written failing-first. Documented in tools review/description.md.
+
+    Gates GREEN: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-validators review` 159 pass; `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-tools -E 'test(review)'` 47 pass; cargo fmt; clippy -p validators -p tools --all-targets -D warnings clean; cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean. Left in doing for /review.
+  timestamp: 2026-07-21T06:26:51.475542+00:00
 position_column: doing
 position_ordinal: '8280'
 title: 'Review engine: .reviewignore (auto-generated, `.kanban/` by default) + honor .gitignore in scope resolution'

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -19,6 +19,10 @@

     Gates GREEN: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-validators review` 159 pass; `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-tools -E 'test(review)'` 47 pass; cargo fmt; clippy -p validators -p tools --all-targets -D warnings clean; cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean. Left in doing for /review.
   timestamp: 2026-07-21T06:26:51.475542+00:00
+- actor: claude-code
+  id: 01ky1nvpstey7cyanhx6b2yykb
+  text: 'Adversarial double-check verdict: REVISE — one low-severity finding (a comment in resolve_scope_files inaccurately claimed the ignore filter sits "upstream of any per-file read"). It doesn''t: resolve_working/file/glob read each candidate''s disk/blob content BEFORE filter_resolved_scope runs; the filter then discards an ignored path''s entry so that content never reaches the review agent. Escape paths are rejected independently/earlier by confine_to_repo. Behavior is correct and non-harmful (content never leaves the process), only the comment was misleading. Fixed the comment to state the real data flow. Re-ran validators review: 159 pass. All other double-check checks PASSed (last-match-wins ordering, matched_path_or_any_parents panic-safety, three-view consistency, gitignore-of-tracked-file, style).'
+  timestamp: 2026-07-21T06:29:54.106057+00:00
 position_column: doing
 position_ordinal: '8280'
 title: 'Review engine: .reviewignore (auto-generated, `.kanban/` by default) + honor .gitignore in scope resolution'
